extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won the sprint having led out himself for the final 10km without teammates, holding off disorganized Quick-Step and Mitchelton efforts
tactical_patterns: ACKERMANN self-led final 10km without leadout train, exposing weakness in traditional sprint train doctrine for flat stages.
Quick-Step Floors failed to control despite numerical presence, suggesting coordination issues when multiple teams attempt simultaneous positioning.

rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: won after unprecedented 10km solo effort at front, indicating exceptional diesel engine capacity for extended high-tempo work
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Boy: neutral: Lotto NL-Jumbo effort faded inside final 600m, unable to close despite positioning
